idea-plugin.name: PowerShell Novel Reader
idea-plugin.description:
伪装成 PowerShell 小说阅读器 A novel reader disguised as a Windows PowerShell terminal inside your JetBrains IDE. It looks exactly like a real terminal with dark theme, blue title bar, PS prompt and Consolas font, so nobody can tell you are reading novels.
Features: - Six disguise modes: plain text, fake logs with timestamps, interleaved build output, git diff, progress bar, and tail -f - Reading progress auto-saved per book, survives IDE restart and page size changes - Configurable novel file, alias, page keys, and lines per page (5-100) - Built-in terminal commands (help, ls, cat, clear, whoami, ipconfig, etc.) - Quick toggle with Ctrl+Alt+N
中文说明：一款伪装成 PowerShell 终端的小说阅读器，支持六种伪装模式（日志/Diff/进度条/tail -f 等），阅读进度自动保存，可自定义翻页快捷键和每页行数。打开 Settings - Tools - PowerShell Novel Reader 选择 txt 文件后，在底部 PowerShell 窗口输入 cat book 即可阅读。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.0.0

  • Initial release / 初始版本
  • PowerShell terminal simulation / PowerShell 终端模拟
  • Novel reader with page navigation / 小说阅读器，支持翻页
  • Six disguise modes / 六种伪装模式
  • Reading progress persistence / 阅读进度持久化保存
  • Configurable settings (file, alias, keys, lines per page, disguise mode) / 可配置设置（文件、别名、快捷键、每页行数、伪装模式）
